title: bolanthus hirsutus
intro: Bolanthus hirsutus, also known as the hairy cat's-ear, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Malvaceae family. It is a perennial plant that is commonly found in dry, rocky areas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bolanthus hirsutus include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, digestive problems, and respiratory issues.
